---
title: 'Musterion'
date: '2011-12-07T16:47:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3966404124258229484'
blogger_filename: '/2011/12/musterion.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Mens Meeting'
---

<b>Mens' Meeting 12/07/2011</b><br /><b>7AM Hutton Financial</b><br /><b><br /></b><br /><b><br /></b><br /><b>FYI&nbsp;</b><br /><b>Men: Here is a challenge. Initiate Prayer with your wife. You cannot agree w/o prayer. You build relationship with the ones you pray for.&nbsp;</b><br /><b><br /></b><br /><b>NO MEETING on the 3rd Wed of December. Pick up again in January.&nbsp;</b><br /><br /><b><u>SUMMARY</u></b><br /><b>Victory is attained by praying through the mystery into the revelation.&nbsp;</b><br /><br />Every situation has a mystery involved. There is an answer to the debt mountain you have. There is an answer to the tax burden you got behind on. There is an answer to handle the task ahead. There is an answer to the marriage problem you've been hammering away at for years. There is an answer to the relationship you have with spouse, kids, parents, siblings, etc... There is an answer to the boss that&nbsp;persecutes&nbsp;you. There is an answer to the promotion that never comes. There is an answer to taking that next hill, victory, battle.<br /><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sherlock-myster-f011510f304c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sherlock-myster-f011510f304c.jpg" /></a>Every situation has an answer. I had a mentor that was assigned for the last years of his career to simply go from business to business, department to department and fix them. His boss sent him places that he'd never been because he had this uncanny ability to see through the problem and turn it around. He said that ALL problem situations, ALL departmental failures, ALL issues in life... no matter how complicated... are the result of the basics going wrong. Somewhere along the line the simple things, the base line things, the things that make that operation run weren't being followed or preformed. He said in life, ALL situations have a simple answer. ALL failures in life are the result of some basic principle of the Word not being followed. Maybe all the basics; or maybe just one.<br /><br /><b>Victory is attained by praying through the mystery into the revelation.&nbsp;</b><br /><br />Behind the situation God has hidden for you the deep things. Hidden FOR YOU not from you. Simply take the time to pray, especially in tongues, over the situation. God will take that mystery and reveal the answer to you. When you finally see it you'll say: "OH... is that all... that's so simple... It was there all along."<br /><br /><b>Victory is attained by praying through the mystery into the revelation.&nbsp;</b><br /><br /><br /><b><u>DETAILS</u></b><br /><b>The meeting details:</b><br /><br /><br /><a href="http://www.terri.com/" target="_blank">Terri Savelle Foy</a>&nbsp;said: writing down the confession isn't enough. <b>Confession my be daily and consistently.</b><br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/proverbs/13-12.htmlhttp://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/proverbs/13-12.html" target="_blank">Proverbs 13:12</a><br />NKJV<br />12 Hope deferred makes the heart sick, But when the desire comes, it is a tree of life.<br />MESSAGE<br />12 Unrelenting disappointment leaves you heartsick, but a sudden good break can turn life around.<br /><div><br /></div><br /><a href="http://www.kcm.org/real-help/prophecy/what-about-2012" target="_blank">Kenneth Copeland&nbsp;Prophesied&nbsp;for 2012</a>: A year of Suddenlies and Surprises. A year where America can be great again!<br /><br />The Father in prayer said this to one of us:<br />Heavenly Father Says: "<b>What do you think I do all day? Do you think I'm distracted? I'm not A.D.D. You are my focus."</b><br /><br />So we can trust He is actively involved in our lives.<br /><br />Pastor Sandy said once in a meeting:<br />"Some of you think that what you are going through is different..."<br />That struck a chord. We all have this&nbsp;tendency&nbsp;to feel our case is different. Our case is unique. Anyone can be delivered from this buy me because I'm different. But we're not. All humans have the same weak flesh. All humans have the same things to overcome. Jesus' Blood and Word covered it all.<br /><br /><b>Hope: RED HOT EXPECTATION!&nbsp;</b><br /><br />Someone said: If I can believe God and get out of debt in two years... I can be wealthy in two years! Glory!<br /><br />Flesh VS Devil: Don't give the devil so much credit. He get's blamed for stuff he didn't even do and he's glad to take the credit. We have a flesh. Sometimes it's just flesh.<br /><br /><b>Situations are not fixed. ONLY the WORD is fixed!</b><br /><br /><b>Taking a look at the word here are some thoughts to ponder. Mystery.&nbsp;</b><br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/1-corinthians/passage.aspx?q=1-corinthians+14:2-4" target="_blank">1 Corinthians 14:2-4</a><br />Praying in tongues: "In the Spirit he speaks mysteries"<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/colossians/1-27.html" target="_blank">Col 1:27</a><br />God made known the riches of this Mystery: Christ in us<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/matthew/13-11.html" target="_blank">Matthew 13:11</a><br />It's been given to us to know the mysteries of the Kingdom of God.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/ephesians/1-9.html" target="_blank">Eph 1:9</a><br />We have been given the mystery of his good will.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/1-corinthians/2-7.html" target="_blank">1 Cor 2:7</a><br />We speak the wisdom of God in a mystery.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=i+tell+you+a+mystery" target="_blank">1 Cor 15</a><br />I tell you a mystery...<br /><br /><b>What other words are there for mystery?</b><br /><a href="http://thesaurus.com/browse/Mystery" target="_blank">Thesaurus for Mystery</a>:<br />Puzzle, Secret, Paradox, Problem, Question, Riddle, Romance, Secrecy, Stickler, Stumper....<br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mystery-visual-thessaurus-e57172e049c3.gif" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="162" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mystery-visual-thessaurus-c993d1e0a015.gif" width="320" /></a></div>Do a simple key word search for: "<b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=Mystery&amp;s=Bibles" target="_blank">Mystery</a></b>" in the bible software. You'll find more hits than you probably thought were there. <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=Mystery&amp;s=Bibles" target="_blank">Too see one such search click here</a>.<br /><br />One such example:<br /><br /><h3 class="PassageTitle" style="color: #; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 18px; font-weight: normal; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 20px; margin-top: 11px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">        <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=mark+4:11&amp;t=kjv" target="_blank">Mark 4:11</a></h3><br /><span class="versenum" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">11</span><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">And</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;he&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3004" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">said</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;unto&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=846" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">them,</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;Unto&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=5213" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">you</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;it is&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1325" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">given</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;to&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1097" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">know</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3466" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">mystery</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;of the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=932" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">kingdom</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;of</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2316" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">God:</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1161" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">but</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;unto&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1565" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">them</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;that are&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1854" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">without,</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;all these&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3956" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">things</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;are&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1096" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">done</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1722" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">in</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3850" style="color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">parables:</a><br /><br /><b><u>Mystery Defined:</u></b><br />The greek word for mystery is <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/musterion.html" target="_blank">Musterion</a>.<br /><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;"><b>Mystery </b>of God: the secret counsels which govern God in dealing with the righteous, which are hidden from ungodly and wicked men but plain to the godly</span><br /><br /><b><u>Websters 1828 Dictionary defines:</u></b><br /><br /><table align="center"><tbody><tr><td align="left"><div class="dictionary"><h1>       <a href="http://1828.mshaffer.com/d/word/mystery" style="color: #7b8b4c; text-decoration: none;" title="[36599] 7 ">mystery</a></h1><div style="color: #465131;"><b style="color: #dad496; font-weight: bold;">MYS'TERY</b>, n. [L. mysterium; Gr. a secret. This word in Greek is rendered also murium latibulum; but probably both senses are from that of hiding or shutting; Gr. to shut, to conceal.</div><div style="color: #;"></div><br /><br /><br /><dd>1. A profound secret; something wholly unknown or something kept cautiously concealed, and therefore exciting curiosity or wonder; such as the mystery of the man with the iron mask in France.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd>2. In religion, any thing in the character or attributes of<br /><div style="color: #;">God, or in the economy of divine providence, which is not revealed to man.</div><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd>3. That which is beyond human comprehension until explained. In this sense, mystery often conveys the idea of something awfully sublime or important; something that excites wonder.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd></dd><dd>Great is the mystery of godliness. 1 Tim.3.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd></dd><dd>Having made known to us the mystery of his will. Eph.1.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd></dd><dd>We speak the wisdom of God in a mystery. 1 Cor.2.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd>4. An enigma; any thing artfully made difficult.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd>5. A kind of ancient dramatic representation.<br /><div style="color: #465131;"></div></dd><dd>6. A trade; a calling; any mechanical occupation which supposes skill or knowledge peculiar to those who carry it on, and therefore a secret to others.</dd></div></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><b>In dealing with Faith and Confession:</b><br /><b>Confession: Renews the Mind</b><br /><b>Faith: Releases the through confession the substance of your renewed mind.</b><br /><b>Mystery: It's not unknowable but simply not revealed.&nbsp;</b><br /><br />God told Joshua:<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=%22see+I+have%22&amp;c=&amp;t=nkjv&amp;ps=10&amp;s=Bibles" target="_blank"> SEE I have</a> given you the city. You have to see it before you ever go and get it. This can only be done by walking in revealed mystery. Revelation knowledge.<br /><br />The <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=spirit+searches&amp;c=&amp;t=nkjv&amp;ps=10&amp;s=Bibles" target="_blank">Spirit searches</a> all things so all things are available to know.<br /><br />Victory is attained by searching passed the mystery through prayer to revelation.<br /><br />Jacob, through revelation, turned plain cattle into <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/passage.aspx?q=genesis+30:39-43" target="_blank">speckled and spotted</a> cattle.<br /><br /><b>Men: Here is a challenge. Initiate Prayer with your wife. You cannot agree w/o prayer. You build relationship with the ones you pray for.&nbsp;</b><br /><br />Also suggested:<br /><br />A book by<br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Think-Grow-Rich-Napoleon-Hill/dp/0449214923" target="_blank">"Think and Grow Rich"</a>&nbsp;by&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Think-Grow-Rich-Napoleon-Hill/dp/0449214923" target="_blank">Napoleon Hill&nbsp;</a></li><li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/s/?ie=UTF8&amp;keywords=books+by+charles+capps&amp;tag=googhydr-20&amp;index=stripbooks&amp;hvadid=7014369557&amp;ref=pd_sl_56f4vdsshb_b" target="_blank">"Faith and Confession" by Charles Capps</a></li></ul><div>That's what I got out of the meeting, Darrell G. Wolfe</div>
